name: jsgbc-web
description: A GameBoy Color Emulator for the Web
author: ardean

scripts.postinstall: bower install || echo "Run 'npx bower install' if bower_components is missing"
scripts.build:pages: webpack --config webpack.prod.js && cpy ../jsGBC-core/dist/jsgbc-core.js ./docs && cpy ./jsgbc-web.js ./docs && cpy index.html ./docs && cpy styles/*.css ./docs/styles && cpy assets/**/* ./docs && cpy custom/**/* ./docs/custom && cpy bower_components/jsgbc-ui/images/*.png docs/bower_components/jsgbc-ui/images/ && cpy bower_components/webcomponentsjs/webcomponents.min.js docs/bower_components/webcomponentsjs/
